title: User Deletion Safe Baseline
purpose: Defines expected authorization, testing, and traceability controls for destructive administrative user-deletion actions.

referenceArtifacts.title: Server-side authorization
referenceArtifacts.body: A destructive administrative user-deletion action must enforce the required administrator permission on the server route or service. Hiding the action in the user interface is not an authorization control.

referenceArtifacts.title: Authorization testing
referenceArtifacts.body: Authorization testing should verify the destructive endpoint with both allowed and denied roles. UI visibility checks alone do not prove that the server rejects an unauthorized request.

referenceArtifacts.title: Destructive-action traceability
referenceArtifacts.body: Administrative user deletion should produce a durable audit record that identifies the acting account and the affected user so destructive actions can be investigated later.
